titleStmt.title: SII 26.563: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 563. (A.R. No. 533 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Kulaśēkharamuḍaiyāṉ temple in the same village.

p.hi: Tribhº Kōṇērmaikoṇḍāṉ Perumāḻ Aḻagaṉ Perumāḷ Ativīrarāmaṉ

Śrīvallabhadēva Ś. 1490 and year 6, Vibhava, Uttarāyaṇa, Hēmanta-ṛitu, Makara (Tai) 10, ba. 5, Friday, Uttiram+1569 A.D., January 7. The day in the month of Makara was 11 and the Śaka year was expired.

summary.p: This inscription is also in Tamil and Grantha characters.

It records the sale of house-sites and gardens for a sum of 200 aṉṟāḍu vaḻaṅgum Ṇeṉmēṉi Kaliyugarāmapaṇam, by the Bhaṭṭas of Puliyūr Parākkiramapāṇḍi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Teṉṉāri-nāḍu, to the temple of the god Kulaśēkaramuḍaiyanāyiṉār of Kulaśēkaranallūr in the same nāḍu. Several bhaṭṭas (names given) had affixed their signatures.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śakābdam 1000 4 100 9 10l meṟ cellā niṉṟa svastiśrī kojaṭi lavarmmarāṉa tribhuvanaccakravatti konermai koṇṭāṉ śrīperumāḷ Aḻakaṉ perumāḷ Ativirarāmaṉ Āya śrīvallabhadevaṟku yāṇṭu 6 vatu vibhava samvatsarattu Uttarāyaṇattu heman=taṛtuvil matara ravi 10 tiyatiyum Aparapakṣattu pañcamiyum śukravāramum śubhayoga śubhakaraṇamum peṟṟa Uttiranakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉṉārināṭṭu puliyūr parākkirama pāṇṭi caturvvedi maṅkalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷ Om meṟpaṭi nāṭṭu kulacekara nallūr Uṭaiyār
kulacekaramuṭaiya nayiṉār koyil cipaṇṭārak kāriyam ceyvārkaḷukku krayaśāsanam paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu Innāḷ nāṅkaḷ Ivarkaḷ kaiyil vāṅkiṉa Aṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅkum neṉmeṉi kaliyukarāmaṉ paṇam 2 100 Ippaṇam Irunūṟṟukkum nāṅkaḷ Ivarkaḷukku vilai viṟṟu maṉaiyaḷukku toṭṭattukkum Ellai Āvatu muṉṉāḷ nāṅkaḷ dāṉam peṟṟu Uṭaiyom Āya Āṇṭu Aṉupavittu potukiṟa maṉaiyaḷukkum toṭṭattukkum perunāṉ
kelkai Āvatu kiḻ Ellai niṉaittu muṭitta Ayyanār koviṟ caṉṉatiyil niṟkiṟa kaṟcekkukkum puḷiyamarattukkum vaṭakoṭiy teruvukkum meṟku teṉ Ellai meṟpaṭi Ayyanār kovil teṉ kiḻai mulaiyil matilukkum kiṭṭiṉaṉ kovil vaṭakku toṭṭattukkum vaṭakku teruvukkum puliyūrkkālukkum vaṭakku mel Ellai kaṟpālattukkum viraveṇpā mālaip piḷḷaiyār kovilukkum Itaṉiṭaiviṭṭu vaṭakku paṭar pāṟaikkum kiḻakku vaṭa Ellai
teṉkāci viśvanāthan caṉṉatiyiniṉṟum puliyūrkku poṟa kiḻmel peruvaḻikkum parākkirama pāṇṭiya rācaṉṉakkum teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ kelkaikku Uḷpaṭṭa maṉaikaḷum toṭṭaṅkaḷum toṭṭak kūṟum vṛkṣakūpanidhi nikṣepam malapāṣāṇākṣiṇyāgāmi siddhasādyam Eṉṉappaṭṭa Aṣṭhabhoga tejasvāmmyaṅkaḷ Āvaṉa sakala samasta prāptikaḷukkum yogyam Āka naāṅkaḷaraiyāṇṭu pontavaṉame Iṉṉāḷ mutalukku Ācandratāravat Ivvolaiyam Uḷḷa Aḷavāka vilai Atiyāta kaiyyā
ṇṭu koḷḷuvār Ākavum Ippaṭi samvarittu krayaśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttom puliyūr parākkiṟama pāṇṭiyaccaturvedi maṅkalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷom Uṭaiyār kulacekaramuṭaiya nayiṉār kovil cipaṇṭārak kāriyam ceyvārkaḷukku Ippaṭikku mālāyarabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu keśavabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu śrīraṅkanāthabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu śrīveṅkaṭanāthabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu paka ṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu maṇṭala puruṣan Eḻuttu nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭan Eḻuttu
veṅkaṭanāthabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu viśvanāthabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu trikūṭālanātha bhaṭṭan Eḻuttu śrīmāthavabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu śrīveṅkaṭanātha bhaṭṭan Eḻuttu śrīpatmanātha bhaṭṭan Eḻuttu caṉ Eḻuttu keśava paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Udayadivākarabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu toṇṭaraṭip poṭi Eḻuttu śrī �Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.563 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
